head.title: Public Anthropology
head.description: Danilyn Rutherford’s public writing brings together essays, commentary, and media appearances that address disability, care, and social policy alongside broader reflections on anthropology, ethics, and contemporary life.

intro: This page brings together writing and appearances aimed at a broader public readership. It is organized into *interventions* (opinion pieces in magazines, newspapers, and other public venues), *reflections* (self-published, long-form essays), and *interviews*. See the [Books](/books) and [Academic Essays](/academic-essays) pages for more formal scholarly publications.
